sentences.translation: Voće i povrće je veoma korisno za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Fruits and vegetables are very beneficial for health.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَوِي الطَّعَامُ الصِّحِّيُّ عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ ضَرُورِيَّةٍ.
أَتَنَاوَلُ تُفَّاحَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِأُقَوِّيَ جِسْمِي.
sentences.translation: Jedem jabuku svaki dan kako bih ojačao svoje tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: I eat an apple every day to strengthen my body.
